Okay, so this is just the assault a skeleton script for your sales video Now I'm not gonna go into great detail and read everything here because you can read it just as well as I can It'll be a really boring video and I went through a lot of this stuff in the quick start guy Basically when I open with a big promise or a hook You know, what if there was this thing that could completely change your life? well, I've got it here and then Like to go right to authority right in the very beginning and if you really watch like what I do and the videos I put out I'm sprinkling in authority non-stop all the way through because authority is what gets people to listen to you And it makes a huge difference when you build that authority in Then you want to show them what the opportunity is You want to show them what the opportunity is? Again want to hit authority and one of the things I want to mention about the skeleton script is a lot of these things You can move them around or you can hit them more than once or revisit them more than once Here is and then proof and testimonials really powerful to you know to whatever level that you've got them Super super powerful. You want to foreshadow urgency somewhere fairly early on You want to make your crushing offer and you got to remember as I talked about earlier in the quick start guide the offer and a bigger picture is the offer is The transformation you're offering them a transformation you're offering them to change their lives and that's really what the offer is and When you're making the offer that that's what you lead with But then as you get further down in your sales video then at what at some point you actually have to talk about what people are Actually going to get because there are some people that are really interested in that and it makes a difference whether it's You know a live seminar that they travel to or it's an online course or whether it's a widget or it's a service or Or it's a webinar or whatever it it makes a difference And so you you know the story the idea is in the bulk of your sales video You're actually going to talk about the bigger picture the transformation the offer as Relates to how their life is going to change but then as you get further down That's when you actually start talking about the stuff then you want to cover bonuses And then you reveal your price and Down here these things can they they these can shift around a little bit Like I like to reveal price and then I often I'll go right to risk reversal your guarantee and Then you know then the call to action which is telling them exactly what to do
